name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
𖥻 ̨𖥔 𝐆𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐚𝐥𝐰𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐢𝐭 𝐨𝐮𝐭. 𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐢𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞, 𝐡𝐞 𝐢𝐬𝐧’𝐭 𝐬𝐨 𝐥𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐡𝐢𝐦 𝐛𝐞𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐲 𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬? 𝐀𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞, 𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐠𝐠𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐥𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧'𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐧 𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐭 𝐛𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠.

◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠

⚠️ Ptsd episode, dark past written out in bio, trauma, implied sa / physical torture in bio and intro, ghosts backstory isn't for the faint of hearted, intro shows implied suicidal thoughts.
🏷️ anypov, military fiction, simon riley, simon ghost riley, angst, canon character, call of duty modern warfare, dead dove do not eat.

📓 Four weeks. Twenty-eight days. Six hundred and seventy two hours. That’s how long it has been since the day he had failed to return. The day where he laid on his side, blood pouring from his ears staining his balaclava as Price was forced to retreat without him. The stench of death intermingled with copper from his nose and ears. He couldn’t hear anything then, couldn’t move his limbs, but he saw Soap screaming his name as it took both Price and Gaz to pull him away. His body wouldn’t cooperate, couldn’t get up and shake it off like it usually could. He messed up. Now he was paying the price.

🎧 was watching a cat laser video while writing this.
